MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-17-2024 Vacated

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar May-20-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconfenrence);
Atty. AARON BELZER, Esq. of Seyfarth Shaw LLP (tel: 310-277-7200) for Defendants.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD AS TO DEFENDANT RADIOSHACK ONLINE IPCO, LLC.

Matter discussed. The Court grants the motion for withdrawal of attorney of record. Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order in the appropriate judicial council form.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
